message:
test(proptest): expand plan.rs and scan_pipeline.rs coverage with 24 new property tests

- proptest_plan.rs (+19 tests, 67→86): serde roundtrips and invariants for
  ApprovalState, Outcome, MissionTxState, MissionKillSwitchLevel, TxOutcome,
  TxPrepareOutcome, TxCommitOutcome, TxCommitStepOutcome, TxCompensationOutcome,
  TxPrecondition; commit_eligible/target_tx_state/is_committed contracts
- proptest_scan_pipeline.rs (+5 tests, 19→24): serde roundtrips for
  CompressionLevelConfig and ScanMetricsSummary; snake_case tag validation,
  density bounds, CompressionLevel conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
